prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: The experience of waking up is a daily occurrence that, while universally shared, remains remarkably underwhelming. It begins with the jarring intrusion of consciousness into the peaceful void of sleep, often accompanied by the unpleasant realization that the day ahead will require effort, productivity, and interaction with other humans. The physical sensations are typically unpleasant: a stiff body, a dry mouth, and the immediate awareness that one has been lying in a position that would be uncomfortable if maintained for any length of time. The mental state upon waking is a foggy limbo between dreams and reality, during which one is temporarily incapable of forming coherent thoughts or performing basic tasks. The alarm clock, that relentless enemy of rest, serves as the official herald of this unwelcome transition. In short, waking up is a necessary but profoundly disappointing ritual that robs you of precious hours of blissful ignorance, only to deposit you back into the mundane reality you were presumably trying to escape.
